mapper.select: select count(1) from submissions where user_id = #{userId} and judge_status = 'ACCEPTED'

select date(submitted_at) as day, count(1) as submissions from submissions where user_id = #{userId} and submitted_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) group by date(submitted_at) order by day asc

select t.tag_name as tagName, sum(wq.wrong_count) as wrongCount from wrong_questions wq join problem_tags pt on pt.problem_id = wq.problem_id join tags t on t.id = pt.tag_id where wq.user_id = #{userId} group by t.id, t.tag_name order by wrongCount desc, t.id asc limit #{limit}
